channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Springboks secure narrow win against Scotland despite defensive lapses
item.description: The Springboks narrowly defeated Scotland in a chaotic rugby clash at Loftus Versfeld, with South Africa's victory marred by defensive errors. Despite leading 14-0 early in the match, the Boks struggl...

item.title: US-Iran tensions lead to closure of Hormuz Strait
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil transit route for Europe, Asia, and parts of the world, has been closed indefinitely after Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) fired warning shots at a...

item.title: TSC Deregisters 7 Teachers After Disciplinary Proceedings
item.description: The Teachers Service Commission (TSC) has deregistered seven teachers and barred them from teaching following disciplinary proceedings under the Teachers Service Commission Act. The names of the affec...

item.title: Religious Leaders Urge Spiritual Discernment for Navigating Modern Challenges
item.description: A recent sermon has called on believers to seek divine grace for accurate spiritual perception and clarity in their daily lives, emphasizing the importance of spiritual discernment in navigating moder...

item.title: Tanzania's Ambitious Plan for a Trillion-Dollar Economy by 2050
item.description: Tanzania has launched an ambitious economic strategy aimed at achieving a one-trillion-dollar economy by 2050, presented at the United Nations High-Level Political Forum in New York. The plan emphasiz...

item.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham Dies at 71 After Brief Illness
item.description: US Senator Lindsey Graham, a prominent Republican from South Carolina, passed away at 71 after a sudden illness. Known for his early criticism of former President Donald Trump, Graham later became one...

item.title: BJP responds to Omar Abdullah's 'Operation Lotus' allegations with demands for evidence
item.description: The article discusses the political controversy surrounding BJP's response to Omar Abdullah's allegations regarding the 'Operation Lotus' incident. Abdullah, a senior leader of the Congress party, acc...

item.title: Filipino Fishers Continue to Face Harassment Despite 10-Year Hague Ruling
item.description: Ten years after the Hague ruling affirmed Philippine sovereignty over the West Philippine Sea, Filipino fishermen continue to face harassment from Chinese authorities. Fisherman Christopher de Vera's ...

item.title: Zen Energy faces financial collapse amid restructuring efforts
item.description: Zen Energy, the company led by Ross Garnaut, has been operating under secretive safe harbour provisions for months prior to its collapse. The board called in McGrathNicol as voluntary administrator on...

item.title: DCI Arrests Murder Suspect in Joy Kanini Gathu Case Following Intelligence-Led Manhunt
item.description: Detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have arrested John Nderitu Mureithi, the main suspect in the murder of 25-year-old Joy Kanini Gathu, whose dismembered remains were dis...

item.title: Iran Launches Missile Attacks on U.S. Allies in Escalating Regional Tensions
item.description: Iran has escalated tensions in the Middle East by launching a series of missile and drone attacks on three major U.S. allies—Qatar, the United Arab Emirates (UAE), and Jordan—following a wave of U.S. ...

item.title: Iran and US escalate Strait of Hormuz tensions amid military strikes
item.description: Iran has closed the Strait of Hormuz indefinitely, accusing the US of continued interference in the region. The closure comes after Iranian forces struck two vessels in the strategic waterway, includi...

item.title: Censorship and Power: The Struggle of 'Satluj' Film
item.description: The article discusses the film 'Satluj,' which explores the dark realities of power and impunity in Punjab's past. Directed by Honey Trehan, the film follows Jaswant Singh Khalra, an activist who unco...

item.title: Canberra Raiders dominate New Zealand Warriors with historic 42-16 victory
item.description: The Canberra Raiders delivered a dominant performance against the New Zealand Warriors, securing a 42-16 win that sets a new NRLW record for the largest margin. The match, played at Canberra Stadium, ...

item.title: Pakistan and Iran Commit to Dialogue and Diplomacy for Regional Peace
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar and Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi emphasized dialogue and diplomacy as the sole solution to regional disputes during their phone conversation. Both leaders acknowl...

item.title: Extreme weather and tornadoes hit Saskatchewan and Manitoba as heat wave persists
item.description: A record-tying 10 tornadoes were reported across Saskatchewan on Friday as a dangerous heat wave intensified extreme weather across the Prairies. Environment Canada meteorologist Kayla Bilous confirme...

item.title: Horoscope Predictions for July 12, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: This article provides personalized horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 12, 2026. Aries is advised to balance duty with pleasure to avoid burnout, while Taurus must assert their boundari...

item.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham Dies at 71 After Sudden Health Emergency
item.description: US Senator Lindsey Graham, a prominent South Carolina politician, has died at the age of 71 following a 'brief and sudden illness.' The news was announced by his office on Saturday evening, with his f...

item.title: Vintage Advertising Campaigns: Lucinda Hollingsworth's 1960s Monet Jewelry Ads by Wingate Paine
item.description: This article explores the iconic advertising campaigns from the 1960s that featured model Lucinda Hollingsworth for Monet Jewelry, captured by renowned photographer Wingate Paine. The advertisements, ...

item.title: Kenyan-Born Teenager Signs Scholarship With Manchester United's Under-18 Team
item.description: Emmanuel Ziro, a 16-year-old Kenyan-born forward, has signed a scholarship with Manchester United's Under-18 academy, marking a significant milestone for Kenyan football. The young talent, who joined ...
